_comment: HAND-ENTRY: WRREB MLS headline figures. The auto-scrape (r/16) currently can't parse the WRREB prose reliably, so update this by hand each month: copy the latest monthly release from https://www.winnipegregionalrealestatenews.com/market-statistics/market-releases , fill every value below, set asOf to the new month, set stale to false, then run `npm --prefix web run data:economic` and commit. vsPriorYearPct / vs5yrAvgPct are whole percents (negative = down). Latest complete set found: March 2026 (the May 2026 release reported sales 1,707 (-4% yoy, +1% vs 5yr), listings 3,739 (+2% yoy), detached $477,313 (+4% yoy, +7% vs 5yr), condo -1% yoy/+5% vs 5yr, but did not state attached/condo prices).
